name: common_sense_935b16c3-68a1-4dda-baa7-fdc7e446ff6c
prompt: The video showcases two adjacent house entrances, each with distinct architectural details. On the left, a black door with a decorative wreath of green foliage stands out against the dark backdrop. The door is framed by clean white trim with intricate molding, and two lush green potted plants flank the entrance. Above the door, a transom window numbered 29 reflects trees, including one with lights. The building is constructed of beige stone arranged in a uniform pattern. Black wrought iron railings separate the pathways leading up to the entrances.  To the right, a light blue door numbered 28 is similarly framed in white trim with a transom window featuring elegant designs. This door also has a wreath, smaller and with grey and purple hues, hanging on it. The light blue door has a brass mail slot on its bottom left and a door knocker on the other side. A star decoration hangs in the large glass window to the right of this entrance, which also reflects trees. The concrete floor in front of both entrances is wet, adding a reflective quality to the scene.  The camera, positioned at eye level, captures a full shot of the two entrances before slowly pushing in to highlight the intricate details of the doors and their surroundings. The black door has a brass mail slot in its middle and a golden door handle on its left side, while the light blue door has a brass mail slot on its bottom left and a door knocker on the other side. The video is well-lit and conveys a calm, serene atmosphere.
